revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:神祇官, en:Department of Divinities, simple:Department of Divinities); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:11, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/100108580 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:11, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:神祇官 | revid=100108580 --> {{分割元ノート|神祇官 (明治時代)|d=ノート:神祇官#分割提案}} == 分割提案 == {{提案}}現在の記事は廃止された方式である[[Wikipedia:曖昧さ回避#1ページに共存]]の状態であるため、それを解消するために明治時代以降の記述を[[神祇官 (明治時代)]]に分割したいと思います。--[[利用者:Syadosa|Syadosa]]（[[利用者‐会話:Syadosa|会話]]） 2024年4月6日 (土) 19:02 (UTC)
{{済}}[[神祇官 (明治時代)]]へ分割しました。--[[利用者:Syadosa|Syadosa]]（[[利用者‐会話:Syadosa|会話]]） 2024年4月22日 (月) 12:08 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:11, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1295495273 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:11, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Department of Divinities | revid=1295495273 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start| {{WikiProject History|auto=yes|importance=}} {{WikiProject Japan|importance=low|shinto=y|law=y|history=y}} }}
== Imported from Simple English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/10618803 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:11, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: simple:Talk:Department of Divinities | revid=10618803 --> {{Talk header}}
==Clan structure==
Moved to main article[[User:Immanuelle|'''Immanuel'''le]] ❤️💚💙 [[User_talk:Immanuelle|(please tag me)]] 03:52, 7 October 2025 (UTC)
[[User:Immanuelle|'''Immanuel'''le]] ❤️💚💙 [[User_talk:Immanuelle|(please tag me)]] 05:34, 13 May 2024 (UTC)
:Look over this and quickly add it to the article if it is good [[User:Immanuelle|'''Immanuel'''le]] ❤️💚💙 [[User_talk:Immanuelle|(please tag me)]] 03:19, 27 September 2025 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:11, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == References for previous section ==
{{reflist-talk}}
[[User:Immanuelle|'''Immanuel'''le]] ❤️💚💙 [[User_talk:Immanuelle|(please tag me)]] 05:34, 13 May 2024 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:11, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Wikification ==
I think it is clear that we need to wikify and simplify this page. Was not in good shape. I am trying to fix it but it is a tough one [[User:Immanuelle|'''Immanuel'''le]] ❤️💚💙 [[User_talk:Immanuelle|(please tag me)]] 04:26, 7 October 2025 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:11, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: I guess I am immediately moving more things than I thought with this template. But hope this goes well. My bot uses a different named header template so we are using it
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:11, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/100108580 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:11, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:神祇官 | revid=100108580 --> {{分割元ノート|神祇官 (明治時代)|d=ノート:神祇官#分割提案}} == 分割提案 == {{提案}}現在の記事は廃止された方式である[[Wikipedia:曖昧さ回避#1ページに共存]]の状態であるため、それを解消するために明治時代以降の記述を[[神祇官 (明治時代)]]に分割したいと思います。--[[利用者:Syadosa|Syadosa]]（[[利用者‐会話:Syadosa|会話]]） 2024年4月6日 (土) 19:02 (UTC)
{{済}}[[神祇官 (明治時代)]]へ分割しました。--[[利用者:Syadosa|Syadosa]]（[[利用者‐会話:Syadosa|会話]]） 2024年4月22日 (月) 12:08 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:11, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1295495273 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:11, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Department of Divinities | revid=1295495273 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start| {{WikiProject History|auto=yes|importance=}} {{WikiProject Japan|importance=low|shinto=y|law=y|history=y}} }}
== Imported from Simple English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/10618803 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:11, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: simple:Talk:Department of Divinities | revid=10618803 --> {{Talk page header}}
==Clan structure==
Moved to main article[[User:Immanuelle|'''Immanuel'''le]] ❤️💚💙 [[User_talk:Immanuelle|(please tag me)]] 03:52, 7 October 2025 (UTC)
[[User:Immanuelle|'''Immanuel'''le]] ❤️💚💙 [[User_talk:Immanuelle|(please tag me)]] 05:34, 13 May 2024 (UTC)
:Look over this and quickly add it to the article if it is good [[User:Immanuelle|'''Immanuel'''le]] ❤️💚💙 [[User_talk:Immanuelle|(please tag me)]] 03:19, 27 September 2025 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:11, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == References for previous section ==

[[User:Immanuelle|'''Immanuel'''le]] ❤️💚💙 [[User_talk:Immanuelle|(please tag me)]] 05:34, 13 May 2024 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:11, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Wikification ==
I think it is clear that we need to wikify and simplify this page. Was not in good shape. I am trying to fix it but it is a tough one [[User:Immanuelle|'''Immanuel'''le]] ❤️💚💙 [[User_talk:Immanuelle|(please tag me)]] 04:26, 7 October 2025 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:11, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Department_of_Divinities here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Department_of_Divinities for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:11, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/100108580 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:11, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:神祇官 | revid=100108580 --> {{分割元ノート|神祇官 (明治時代)|d=ノート:神祇官#分割提案}} == 分割提案 == {{提案}}現在の記事は廃止された方式である[[Wikipedia:曖昧さ回避#1ページに共存]]の状態であるため、それを解消するために明治時代以降の記述を[[神祇官 (明治時代)]]に分割したいと思います。--[[User:Syadosa|Syadosa]]（[[利用者‐会話:Syadosa|会話]]） 2024年4月6日 (土) 19:02 (UTC)
{{済}}[[神祇官 (明治時代)]]へ分割しました。--[[User:Syadosa|Syadosa]]（[[利用者‐会話:Syadosa|会話]]） 2024年4月22日 (月) 12:08 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:11, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1295495273 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:11, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Department of Divinities | revid=1295495273 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start| {{WikiProject History|auto=yes|importance=}} {{WikiProject Japan|importance=low|shinto=y|law=y|history=y}} }}
== Imported from Simple English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/10618803 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:11, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: simple:Talk:Department of Divinities | revid=10618803 --> {{Talk page header}}
==Clan structure==
